---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Biel Mante"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(spanishoddata)
```

```{r}
spod_set_data_dir(data_dir = "~/spanish_od_data")
```


```{r}
distritos <- spod_get_zones("distritos", ver = 2)
```




```{r}
od_db <- spod_get(
  type = "origin-destination",
  zones = "municipios",
  dates = c(start = "2024-03-01", end = "2024-03-07")
)
```

```{r}
od_db
```
